dialogueChunks.intro: The inventory count moved up, {player_name}. We're out of time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} announced a surprise audit: they're counting the storehouse supplies tonight. The supplies you gathered aren't enough to cover {quest_focus}. Worse, the neighbor's children are sick now. I need you to gather more {quest_item} to fill the gap AND find healing herbs in the wilds {location_hint}. The {enemy_type} have been thick along the treeline, but those children can't wait.
dialogueChunks.outro: One act of kindness turned into a cascade of problems. {quest_stakes}, but I need your help more than ever now.

playerResponses.text: Sick children and a ticking clock. I'll move fast.
Every time I turn around, this gets more complicated. But those kids need help.
You're in too deep. Turn yourself in before it gets worse.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the search is getting closer. {target_npc} questioned my sister this morning.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The questioning was polite but thorough. {quest_threat} is intensifying. Meanwhile, the escape route {location_hint} has been compromised: a patrol of {enemy_type} set up camp across the path. {quest_focus} is growing desperate, talking about surrendering to spare my sister. I need you to clear that route and find {quest_item} to provision the journey.
dialogueChunks.outro: If the soldier surrenders, {quest_stakes}. I won't let my sister hang for having a kind heart.

playerResponses.text: Clear the route, provision the journey. I'll make it happen.
Your sister's kindness shouldn't cost her life. Let me handle the monsters.
The net is closing and I'm helping you slip through it. This is going to end badly.

dialogueChunks.intro: They almost caught me, {player_name}. An enforcer was watching the distribution house.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I had to destroy a week's worth of {quest_focus} to keep it from being seized. {target_npc} warned me: {quest_threat} is hiring a tracker. There's an old herbalist's cottage {location_hint}, abandoned after the {enemy_type} moved in. If you can clear it out and gather more {quest_item}, I can set up where the guild will never find me.
dialogueChunks.outro: I destroyed medicine that sick people needed. {quest_stakes} hangs in the balance. Help me make more before anyone suffers for my caution.

playerResponses.text: A hidden cottage and fresh ingredients. We'll have medicine flowing again in no time.
The guild is closing in. A hidden location is smart. Let's move.
Enforcers and trackers. You're going to get us both caught.
